LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, APR-23-2019 HEARING HELD ON DEFENDANT SYNCTRUCK, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IN LIEU OF FILING AN ANSWER. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN LARGE PART. PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS BROUGHT AS THE SECOND THROUGH EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION MUST BE ARBITRATED. PLAINTIFF'S CLASS CLAIMS AND FIRST INDIVIDUAL CAUSE OF ACTION ARE STAYED PENDING THE COMPLETION OF THE ARBITRATION. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR# 5153, EMAIL: LNAJERA@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. (302/EPS)

Defendant Synctruck, Llc Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration In Lieu Of Filing An Answer (Added For Purpose Of Entering Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration In Lieu Of Filing An Answer
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allen Feghali, Esq., Moon & Yang, 213-232-3128, appearing for Plaintiff; (CourtCall)
Christopher Alvarez, Esq., Fisher Phillips, 916-210-0403, appearing for Defendant Syntruck, LLC;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling:

Defendant Synctruck, LLC's motion to compel arbitration in lieu of filing an answer is GRANTED in large part. Plaintiff's individual claims brought as the second through eighth causes of action must be arbitrated. Plaintiff's class claims and first individual cause of action are stayed pending the completion of the arbitration. (see word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR# 5153, email: lnajera@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/EPS)
